home.title: Jaize · Production-ready AI agents, RAG, and automation
home.description: Production-ready AI systems for Dutch scale-ups: AI agents, RAG assistants, document automation, and full-stack delivery. Fixed prices, fixed scope.

hero.headline: Production-ready AI: agents, RAG, and document automation.
hero.lead: For Dutch scale-ups and SMBs. LangGraph, RAG, OCR, and full-stack — from prototype to production. Fixed price or day rate.

services.title: Productized engineering — fixed scope, fixed price.

items.q: Do you work remote or on-site?
items.a: Both. Mostly remote, with regular visits to Amsterdam, Utrecht or Eindhoven when useful for the engagement.
€800–880 per day for hourly engagements. Most work is fixed-price based on the services above.

items.q: Do you work with one client at a time?
items.a: No. I work with multiple clients in parallel — usually max 12–15 days per month per engagement. This protects independence and focus.
Fixed prices are agreed up front. Changes go through a short change request with adjusted price and timeline.

items.q: What language do you work in?
items.a: English — documentation, code, meetings, and email. Industry standard for tech teams in the Netherlands.

cta.title: Ready to build something?
cta.lead: A 15-minute call gives both of us quick clarity on whether there's a fit.

services.title: Services · Jaize
services.description: Five fixed-price engagements for AI integration, MVP development, and technical leadership. Clear, predictable, production-ready.

hero.headline: Productized engineering. Fixed scope, fixed price, fixed timeline.
hero.lead: Five ways I work with Dutch scale-ups and SMEs. No quote ballet — pick what fits.

items.name: RAG Knowledge Assistant
items.for: Companies with heavy internal documentation — manuals, contracts, policies, tickets — that need teams to find answers faster.
items.summary: Secure RAG assistant over your company documents. Vector search, citations, evaluation, and production deployment.
delivers: Document ingestion pipeline (PDF, DOCX, web pages, Notion, etc.)
Vector database (Pinecone, Weaviate, or pgvector)
LLM layer with OpenAI, Anthropic or Gemini + LangChain
Chat UI with citations, history, and feedback
Evaluation suite for answer quality
Deployment on AWS, GCP, or Cloudflare with monitoring
items.excludes: Ongoing content curation and end-user support.

items.name: AI Workflow Agent
items.for: Companies with repetitive research, operations, or analysis workflows that need automating with AI that actually reasons.
items.summary: AI agent built with LangGraph combining tools, memory, and structured reasoning to automate a complete business workflow.
delivers: Discovery: workflow mapping and scope definition
Multi-step LangGraph agent with tool-use, memory, and validation
Tool integrations (APIs, databases, document stores, email)
Human-in-the-loop checkpoints for critical decisions
Production deployment, monitoring, and cost tracking
Documentation and team walkthrough
items.excludes: Custom model training. Uses LLM APIs, not self-hosted models.

items.name: Production-Ready AI SaaS MVP
items.for: Founders and scale-ups taking an AI product from idea to deployed product — backend, frontend, auth, dashboards, and AI features.
items.summary: Full AI SaaS MVP: backend, frontend, auth, dashboards, AI features, and deployment. Ready for your first paying customers.
delivers: NestJS / Node backend with REST or GraphQL API
Next.js frontend with Tailwind and responsive design
Auth (JWT or OAuth), RBAC, multi-tenant if needed
AI features: LLM workflows, RAG, OCR, or vision per scope
Admin / analytics dashboard
Deployment on AWS, GCP, or Cloudflare with CI/CD
items.excludes: Native mobile apps. Complex machine learning (use AI Workflow Agent or RAG).

items.name: Document Intelligence & OCR Automation
items.for: Accountants, compliance teams, logistics, HR, or admin-heavy businesses that process documents manually.
items.summary: End-to-end document automation: OCR, classification, structured extraction, validation agents, and API or dashboard delivery.
delivers: OCR pipeline (Tesseract, AWS Textract, or Google Document AI)
Document classification (invoices, receipts, contracts, forms)
LLM-driven structured extraction (key-value and tables)
Validation agents that catch errors before downstream systems accept them
API or dashboard integration with your existing tooling
Audit trail and exportable reporting
items.excludes: Hardware (scanners) and legal advice on data retention.

items.name: AI Integration Audit
items.for: CTO or founder who needs to know where AI actually adds value to their existing product — and where it's a distraction.
items.summary: Quick technical review of your stack, identification of 5–10 highest-impact AI integration opportunities, with prioritized roadmap and proof-of-concept.
delivers: Day 1–2: codebase and product walkthrough
Day 3: best-fit AI tooling research (LLM, RAG, OCR, vision)
Day 4: working prototype of one high-impact integration
Day 5: report with roadmap, cost projection, 90-day plan
60-minute readout call with your team
items.excludes: Implementation (separate engagement as RAG, Agent, or MVP).

items.name: Fractional Tech Lead / AI Advisor
items.for: 5–20 person startups without full-time technical leadership who need senior thinking on architecture, AI strategy, and hiring.
items.summary: One day per week of strategic plus tactical technical leadership — architecture, AI roadmap, hiring, team coaching, vendor evaluations.
delivers: 1 day per week (Wednesdays default) on-site or remote
Weekly 1-on-1 with founder or CEO
Architecture decisions and code reviews
AI roadmap and build-vs-buy guidance
Hiring support: job posts, technical interviews, leveling
Async support during the week
items.excludes: Full-time feature engineering and production on-call.

cta.title: Not sure which fits?
cta.lead: Book a 15-minute call — I'll honestly tell you which one (or none) fits.

work.title: Work · Jaize
work.description: Three recent engagements — AI computer vision platform, scaling a tech team from 2 to 12+, and backend for a receipt-management platform.

hero.headline: What I've built recently.
hero.lead: Three engagements with concrete outcomes. No marketing, no logo soup — just what I shipped.

cases.sector: AI computer vision · Industrial quality control
cases.challenge: Replace a legacy quality control platform with an AI-driven system that automatically classifies millions of product images.
cases.approach: Full stack built from scratch: NestJS backend (37+ modules), Vue.js frontend (49 pages), PostgreSQL, and NVIDIA Triton inference pipeline with ResNet and YOLO. Hybrid on-prem plus cloud setup.
outcomes: 3M+ AI inference calls delivered in production
5 languages supported with multi-locale annotation workflows
~3TB of product data migrated with zero data loss
Automated backups (pg_dump + offsite NAS) and zero-downtime deployments

cases.challenge: Grow a 2-person engineering team to production-ready velocity at a typical startup with rapidly growing product demands.
cases.approach: Inherited 2-person team grown to 12+ engineers (mobile, backend, web, cloud). React Native with shared backend for iOS plus Android. Reported to board on technical strategy.
outcomes: Engineering team grown from 2 → 12+ in 18 months
React Native app published on App Store and Google Play
OAuth2 / Firebase Auth with RBAC across web and mobile
Full DevOps / CI/CD setup on AWS

cases.challenge: Extend a receipt-scanning app with OCR pipeline, expense categorization and analytics API.
cases.approach: Built NestJS backend with OCR pipeline, JWT authentication, receipt categorization and expense analytics API. Deployed on GCP with CI/CD.
outcomes: Backend with OCR pipeline live in production

cta.title: Similar engagement in mind?
cta.lead: Let's talk — I'll tell you in 15 minutes whether I can add value.

about.title: About · Jaize
about.description: AI software engineer, based in IJlst. M.Sc. Big Data and IoT. 5+ years of professional experience shipping production-ready AI systems, RAG, agents, and full-stack.

hero.headline: Abdellah Jaize · AI Software Engineer.
hero.lead: I build production-ready AI systems — agents, RAG, document automation, and the full stack around them. 5+ years professional.

bio: I'm a Moroccan AI software engineer based in IJlst, Friesland. My work focuses on production-ready AI systems — agents, RAG, document automation — and the full-stack that supports them.

I started as a full-stack engineer and grew into tech lead at a sportstech startup where I scaled the engineering team from 2 to 12+. After that, 2.5 years as sole technical owner of an AI computer vision platform for a Dutch agritech company — application, ML pipelines, hybrid infrastructure, and production operations.
I work independently with Dutch scale-ups and SMBs that need production-ready AI systems — not POCs, but systems that scale and keep working.

approach.title: My approach
items: End-to-end ownership — I build the whole system, not one layer
Fixed price and fixed scope where possible — no quote ballet
Production-ready from day 1 — monitored, tested, deployed
Honest assessments — if I think something doesn't fit, I'll say so

credentials.title: Background
education: M.Sc. Big Data & IoT, ENSAM Casablanca (2019–2021)
B.Sc. Big Data & Massive Data Management, FST Settat (2018–2019)
certs: NVIDIA DLI: Fundamentals of Deep Learning (2021)
NVIDIA DLI: Building Intelligent Recommender Systems (2022)
